items.title: Trump scraps threat of 20% fee on Hormuz cargo as US prepares to resume blockade of Iran ports
items.dek: Trump drops a 24-hour-old vow to charge cargo ships for using the Strait as the US continues its battle to break Iran's hold on the waterway.
items.body: Trump drops a 24-hour-old vow to charge cargo ships for using the Strait as the US continues its battle to break Iran's hold on the waterway.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Thief tries to rob bank in Beltsville with stolen kitten in hand
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump pays writer E Jean Carroll $5m in damages over sexual abuse and defamation
items.dek: The president had sought to delay the payment as he tried to persuade the Supreme Court to overturn the judgement.
items.body: The president had sought to delay the payment as he tried to persuade the Supreme Court to overturn the judgement.
items.author: IriLine Desk
